name: more-money-than-god-hedge-funds-and-the-making-of-a-new-elite
displayName: More Money Than God: Hedge Funds and the Making of a New Elite
description: Sebastian Mallaby's definitive history of the hedge fund industry — from A.W. Jones's 1949 invention through Soros, Robertson, Steinhardt, Simons, and the LTCM collapse. An executable toolkit covering hedge fund strategies, investment philosophies of legendary managers, risk management lessons from major blowups, and practical applications for modern investors.
author: Sebastian Mallaby
useCases: Understanding hedge fund history and the A.W. Jones invention
Learning investment philosophies from Soros, Robertson, Steinhardt, Simons
Risk analysis of major hedge fund blowups (LTCM, 1994, 2008)
Hedge fund strategy frameworks (long/short, macro, quant, arbitrage)
Applying hedge fund thinking to personal investing and risk management

intents.history: Track the evolution of hedge funds from 1949 to the 2008 crisis
intents.strategy: Learn the specific investment approaches of legendary fund managers
intents.risk: Understand how and why hedge funds fail
intents.personal: Apply hedge fund discipline to your own portfolio
